message:
test(harness): resource_ops harness-matrix subprocess coverage (bd-3thu)

Adds resource_ops_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix
which dispatches every fixture case through the
`harness conformance-matrix-case` subprocess. Same code path the CI
conformance matrix uses, so packaging/dispatch regressions surface
even when the in-process executor still passes. Existing in-process
oracle (resource_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case) is
preserved.

All cases pass via both paths (getrlimit/setrlimit + error paths).

Verification (rch + isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_4):
  cargo test  -p frankenlibc-harness --test resource_ops_conformance_test
                                                     12 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-harness          clean
  ubs <touched>                                       exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
